title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Kaido, King as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: armory

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is bad! If it keeps going,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It'll set off an explosion mid-air!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The whole island will be gone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: FUGA!! I need your help with something!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: FUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The CPO agents are behind that wall of flames.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's hurry, they'll be on our tails again soon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: APAPA PAPAPA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Lapdogs of the celestial dragons spotted in Kaido's Castle!!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a scoop!! Maybe I'll sell the story to Morgans!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "After losing their middle-man, doFlamingo, the government deals directly with..."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You should've kept your mouth shut.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Bwah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Guh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: APO?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: X DRAKE.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope you didn't assume that your true allegiance would remain a secret to CPO?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you already know, I'm dying to hear your excuse for being here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We're just...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Handling pest control!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: "Boom!" I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn government Assassins!! That freakin' hurt!! Part... Part...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oh... you're still alive?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I can use arrangement Haki, you dumbass!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: These guys aren't getting off that easy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you!! I knew you were a Marine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Cram it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are we doing this or not?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Obviously!! They picked a fight with me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You started it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They'll get what's coming to them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ROAR!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: VRGHH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Outside - zero vs. King

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
